title: Bridge Essay: The Differential Impact of Mystery in Nature on Attention: An Oculometric Study.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nature connectedness — biophilia hypothesis, nature neuroscience, environmental neuroscience.

**The Differential Impact of Mystery in Nature on Attention: An Oculometric Study.**. Front Psychol.. PMID: 34955980. DOI: 10.3389/fpsyg.2021.759616. Nature exposure can provide benefits on stress, health and cognitive performance. According to Attention Restoration Theory (ART), the positive impact of nature on cognition is mainly driven by fascination. Fascinating properties of nature such as water or awinding hiking trail may capture involuntary attention, allowing the directed form of attention to rest and to recover.
